author: @steve_ancell
text: If you like historical places you might like Rottingdean, Stanmer, Falmer and Lewes here in Brighton East Sussex.

author: @VacuumTube88
text: Hey Rob do you plan to visit other places in Italy? If it happens to come down here in Rome, give a yell! Hope you'll enjoy your stay :)

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I have been to quite a few places in Italy mate - Rome, Venice, Lecce, San Dona Di Piave Jeselo, Trieste to mention a few but equally there are lots of places I haven't been - I love the country and the people so I will certainly be back - when I am next in Rome I will give you a shout - we can go for coffee - cheers mate

author: @TodayFreedom
text: I’ve never seen anyone on YouTube more suited to a TV show of their own. I could listen to Rob’s talks all day long. You either have this gift or you don’t- he’s an absolute natural.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: Oh wow - that's a really kind thing to say mate - thank you for taking the trouble to say it - it's well appreciated - all the best

author: @PhilWaud
text: Thanks for the video Rob, I thought you'd gone all posh on us until you explained why you were there. I'm sure others will comment but the white bike is a ghost bike which are left at the scene where a cyclist had a fatal accident. It's one of those things that people see but don't realise.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: oh I have to scrub up for the new baby mate lol - and you are right I didn't know that - what a testament - kind of beautiful and sad if you think about it

author: @annamolly1261
text: Milan is beautiful, but personally I prefer Florence. There are a lot of artisans and workshops there.

author: @Altinos
text: The white painted bikes are called ghost bikes and are usually used as a memorial to a cyclist that was killed by a car.

replies.author: @jonwuan4349
replies.text: Yes

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I really didn't know that mate - that is kind of sad and beautiful - thanks for letting me know
